dashboardMeta.updatePolicy: Every completed analysis is pushed and reflected in the public dashboard.

currentAnalysis.title: Modeling v3: blended sequence + descriptor learners
currentAnalysis.summary: Thorough v3 pass with sequence hash ridge, dense descriptor gradient boosting, reduced hybrid features, and validation-tuned blending. Results compared against v1 and v2 baselines per target.

descriptorSets.seq_hash: Character hash n-grams from raw sequence
descriptorSets.dense_descriptors: Physicochemical + amino acid composition + dipeptide + terminal residue descriptors
descriptorSets.hybrid_dense: Dense descriptors plus reduced sequence components
descriptorSets.blend: Validation-tuned linear blend of best sequence and dense models

comparison.rationale: It directly weights methods by observed sequence predictability/reliability from v3, stays interpretable, and avoids treating weaker methods as equal votes.
